Bus Timings

F33 Bus Timetable Mall Of The Emirates to Street 62 and Return

March 5, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Bus F33 provides a crucial link within Dubai’s public transport network, connecting the Mall of the Emirates to various residential and commercial areas throughout Al Barsha. This service is designed to cater to both daily commuters and visitors exploring the city’s vibrant neighborhoods. With its comprehensive route and frequent service, Bus F33 offers a reliable and accessible means of travel across a broad spectrum of destinations.

Route Name F33
Route Description Mall of the Emirates Bus Station · 3
Total Distance Approximately 7 kilometers
Total Journey Time Approximately 36 minutes
Operational Hours 04:06 to 00:24 (Depending on Starting Point)
Fare AED 3
Official Website RTA Dubai

Download PDF Bus F33

Bus F33 Route in Dubai

Bus Timings

The F33 bus operates with the following schedule:

From Mall Of The Emirates From Street 62
04:06 04:45
05:05 05:44
06:05 06:44
07:15 07:54
07:50 08:29
08:30 09:09
09:10 09:49
09:45 10:24
10:25 11:04
11:05 11:44
11:40 12:19
12:25 13:04
13:05 13:44
13:50 14:29
14:45 15:24
16:00 16:39
16:45 17:24
17:15 17:54
18:05 18:44
18:40 19:19
19:25 20:04
19:45 20:24
20:30 21:09
21:00 21:39
21:35 22:14
22:10 22:49
22:40 23:19
23:45 00:24

Bus F33 Timetable

For the full schedule, you can visit the official RTA website or follow this link to access the F33 Bus Timings.

Bus Ticket Price

Traveling on the F33 bus costs AED 3. This affordable fare makes it easy for passengers to travel comfortably between key locations in Al Barsha. The pricing ensures that the bus remains a cost-effective choice for both daily commuting and occasional trips across Dubai’s diverse neighborhoods.

Bus Booking

Currently, there is no specific online booking system available for the F33 bus route. Passengers can board the bus at any of the designated stops along the route. For real-time updates and route information, the RTA Dubai app is a useful tool for checking schedules and planning your journey efficiently.

Bus Route

The F33 bus route begins at the Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3 and travels through key locations in Al Barsha. Here’s a detailed list of the stops along the route:

  1. Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3

  2. Mall of the Emirates

  3. Mall of the Emirates 2

  4. Saleh Bin Lahej Building

  5. Coral Boutique Hotel

  6. Habtoor House

  7. Al Barsha B

  8. Roots Saloon

  9. Street 329 A

  10. Al Hawa Street A

  11. Al Hawa Street B

  12. Al Hawa Street C

  13. Street 39

  14. Street 39, 2

  15. Street 32B

  16. Bin Lahej Masjid, Street 32B

  17. Al Salam School

  18. Street 329 B

  19. Al Barsha Mall, Street 23

  20. Street 43-1

  21. Street 43, Park 3

  22. Street 42B

  23. Street 62

  1. Street 62

  9. Al Barsha Mall, Street 23

  10. Street 329 B

  11. Street 329 A

  12. Roots Saloon

  13. Veterinary Clinic

  14. Saleh Bin Lahej Building

  15. Mall Of The Emirates Bus Station · 3

Bus F33 Station Overview

Mall of the Emirates Bus Station · 3

This bus station serves as a vital connection point for shoppers, visitors, and commuters heading to the mall.

It is equipped with essential amenities such as comfortable seating, ticketing services, and real-time schedule updates.

Al Barsha 1 B Bus Stop Intersection

The Al Barsha 1 B Bus Stop is a key transit point where Bus Routes F35 and F33 intersect. Located in the bustling Al Barsha area, this stop provides passengers with convenient connections to various parts of the city. Whether you’re commuting to nearby residential areas or popular destinations, this bus stop offers a strategic location for easy travel within the neighborhood.

Intersection at Al Barsha, Veterinary Clinic 1 Bus Stop

The Al Barsha, Veterinary Clinic 1 Bus Stop serves as a crucial junction for F35 and F33. This intersection provides passengers with efficient transfer options between these routes, enhancing connectivity and convenience for travelers in the Al Barsha area.

Street 62, 2

Street 62, 2 Bus Station is situated in a bustling area providing access to various local destinations and services. This station plays a crucial role in connecting passengers to different neighborhoods and commercial zones. Its central location facilitates efficient transit options for those traveling within the area, making it a key part of the local transportation network.

Tourist Destination Along the Way

The F33 bus route in Dubai passes by several notable locations and tourist attractions. Here are some key highlights:

  1. Mall of the Emirates: This major shopping mall is famous for its extensive range of high-end shops, dining options, and entertainment facilities, including Ski Dubai, an indoor ski resort.

  2. Coral Boutique Hotel: Located in the Al Barsha area, this hotel is a comfortable choice for visitors looking to stay near the Mall of the Emirates and other attractions.

  3. Al Barsha Mall: A popular shopping and entertainment center featuring various retail stores, dining options, and recreational facilities.

  4. Union Coop: A large hypermarket chain where visitors can shop for groceries, household items, and more.

  5. Ski Dubai: While not directly on the F33 route, it’s worth noting that Mall of the Emirates, a key stop on this route, houses this famous indoor ski resort.

  6. Al Barsha Park: Although not a direct stop, this park is nearby and offers a relaxing green space for visitors.

These locations along the F33 bus route provide ample opportunities for shopping, dining, and entertainment, making the bus route convenient for both tourists and locals.

Journey Experience

A trip on the F33 bus from Mall of the Emirates to Street 62 offers a smooth and efficient journey through various vibrant parts of Dubai.

As the bus passes through bustling neighborhoods, passengers can catch glimpses of Dubai’s modern urban landscape, featuring towering skyscrapers and well-planned residential zones. The journey provides easy access to several local amenities and parks, making it convenient for both commuters and casual travelers. By the time you reach Street 62 and return, you’ve experienced a balanced view of Dubai’s busy city life and tranquil residential areas, offering a practical yet scenic travel experience.

Travelling with Careem

The app provides a convenient way to book your ride, with the fare ranging from AED 29 to AED 34. This allows you to reach your destination comfortably while enjoying a seamless travel experience.

Bus F33 offers a vital link across Al Barsha, connecting popular destinations from the Mall Of The Emirates to various residential and commercial areas. With its frequent service and comprehensive route, it provides a reliable and affordable option for daily commutes and casual travel. Whether heading to a local shop or exploring the neighborhood, Bus F33 ensures convenient access to key spots. For real-time updates, the RTA Dubai app is a valuable tool for planning your journey.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 5, 2026.

Written by Al Khaleej
